pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.2 to align with JDK 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Upgrade SpotBugs Maven plugin to a version compatible with newer JDKs and dependencies.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added standard patterns to ignore compiled classes, logs, and archive files generated by the JVM.
Removed ignore patterns specific to Spring Tool Suite (STS) IDE.
Removed ignore patterns specific to NetBeans IDE.
Removed ignore patterns specific to VS Code IDE.
Removed specific ignore entry for HELP.md file.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Removed the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Compose specification standards.
Upgraded the PostgreSQL image for the stats-db service from version 14-alpine to 16.1.
Upgraded the PostgreSQL image for the ewm-db service from version 14-alpine to 16.1.

ewm-main-service-spec.json.general_idea: Updated the OpenAPI info section to include a description and change the title to Russian.
ewm-main-service-spec.json.human_impl: "description": "Documentation \"Explore With Me\" API v1.0", "title": "\"Explore With Me\" API сервер"

ewm-main-service-spec.json.general_idea: Added minimum value constraint of 0 to the 'from' pagination parameter in multiple endpoints.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 7000) to the 'text' search parameter.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 50) to the 'name' field in category schemas.
Added length restrictions (min 1, max 50) to the 'title' field in compilation schemas.
Added length restrictions (min 6, max 254) to the 'email' field in user schemas.
Added length restrictions (min 2, max 250) to the 'name' field in user schemas.
